name: Gold Pride - Eliminator
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＧＰ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゴールド・プライド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－アサシネーター
desc: If your LP are lower than your opponent's: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish 1 other "Gold Pride" monster from your hand, face-up field, or GY; Special Summon 1 "Gold Pride Token" (Machine/DARK/ATK 0/DEF 0) with the same Level as that banished monster, also this card cannot be used as material for a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Summon this turn, except for a "Gold Pride" monster. You can only use each effect of "Gold Pride - Eliminator" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If your LP are lower than your opponent's: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish 1 other "Gold Pride" monster from your hand, face-up field, or GY; Special Summon 1 "Gold Pride Token" (Machine/DARK/ATK 0/DEF 0) with the same Level as that banished monster, also this card cannot be used as material for a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Summon this turn, except for a "Gold Pride" monster. You can only use each effect of "Gold Pride - Eliminator" once per turn.
eff: If your LP are lower than your opponent's: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish 1 other "Gold Pride" monster from your hand, face-up field, or GY; Special Summon 1 "Gold Pride Token" (Machine/DARK/ATK 0/DEF 0) with the same Level as that banished monster, also this card cannot be used as material for a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Summon this turn, except for a "Gold Pride" monster. You can only use each effect of "Gold Pride - Eliminator" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Cannot be used as a Fusion Material
Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
Cannot be used as an Xyz Material
Cannot be used as a Link Material
